message:
docs: rename telemetry references to history across docs and packs module

Update terminology throughout documentation and code comments to reflect
the telemetry→history module rename completed in the main refactoring.

Files updated:
- docs/pack-maintenance.md: Section 7 privacy note
- docs/pattern-library-design.md: Severity::Low description
- src/packs/mod.rs: Severity and DecisionMode doc comments

This commit ensures consistent terminology across all documentation and
inline comments. The history module provides command logging, statistics,
and pack effectiveness analysis - "history" better conveys the feature's
purpose as a command audit trail rather than anonymous usage metrics.

Terminology changes:
- "telemetry" → "history" in privacy/safety guidance
- "telemetry/learning" → "history/learning" in severity descriptions
- "record for telemetry" → "record for history" in decision mode docs

Part of the telemetry→history rename initiative. No functional changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -68,5 +68,5 @@ matrix:
 
 ## 7) Privacy and Safety
 
-Telemetry and version checking must never log command contents. Use hashes
+History and version checking must never log command contents. Use hashes
 and metadata only.
